repoDescription: A .NET Standard library written in F# that defines the data contracts for a loan selling and management system. This library provides standardized data models used for communication between services in a microservice architecture.
purpose: To provide a shared contract library containing data models, DTOs, and request/response objects for loan selling operations between various microservices in a lending system.

keyFiles.description: Defines core loan data models including status types, purchase operations, and loan information structures
Contains models for invoices and receipts related to loan purchases, including fees and transaction data
Defines batch processing models for handling operations across multiple loans
Models for batch updates to loan purchase dates
Models for handling discrepancies between loan data across systems
Contains models for loan grooming processes including reverse interest and principal transfers
Defines request model for reversing interest on loans
Defines an attribute for marking properties containing personally identifiable information

businessFeatures: Invoice and receipt generation for loan purchases
SOFR (Secured Overnight Financing Rate) rate tracking

dataEntities.name: Loan
dataEntities.description: Core loan entity with status tracking, origination details, investor information, and purchase data

dataEntities.name: LoanInfo
dataEntities.description: Comprehensive loan data including borrower details, loan terms, payment schedules, and financial metrics

dataEntities.name: Invoice
dataEntities.description: Represents a purchase invoice for loans with detailed fee information

dataEntities.name: Receipt
dataEntities.description: Documents successful and failed loan purchases from a batch operation

dataEntities.name: BatchInfo
dataEntities.description: Tracks batch operation progress with success/failure statistics

dataEntities.name: PurchaseAccount
dataEntities.description: Account details used for loan purchases

dataEntities.name: Discrepancy
dataEntities.description: Tracks differences between loan data in different systems

dataEntities.name: SofrRate
dataEntities.description: SOFR rate value for a specific date

messagingPatterns.name: Request/Response
messagingPatterns.description: Standardized request and response objects for operations like loan purchases, updates, and transfers

messagingPatterns.name: Batch Operations
messagingPatterns.description: Models supporting bulk operations on multiple loans with results tracking

integrations.name: COS Transfer System
integrations.description: Integration with a COS (Core Operating System) transfer system for handling financial transfers using cosTransferId

securityConcerns.name: PII Data Handling
securityConcerns.description: Uses PIIDataAttribute to mark personally identifiable information fields like SSN, address, phone, email in loan data

architecturePatterns.name: Data Transfer Objects (DTOs)
architecturePatterns.description: Provides standardized objects for data exchange between services

architecturePatterns.name: Contract-First Design
architecturePatterns.description: Establishes a shared understanding of data structures across system components

architecturePatterns.name: Immutable Data Models
architecturePatterns.description: F# records and classes with read-only properties promote immutability

findings.description: LoanInfo class contains significant PII data (SSN, address, contact information) that requires proper handling
